widgets_values: Should be at minimum 480 with mode 'max'.
1760 is the highest I can go on 16GB GPU on Linux
If you need to crop the image just paint around the area you want to keep, does not need to get filled in fully. Make sure to set your preferred anchor position.

nodes.title: Prompt
widgets_values: the camera pulls back, cinematic movement, at night
